headline: How Removal From Key Russell Growth Indexes Will Impact HCA Healthcare (HCA) Investors
summary: In late June 2026, HCA Healthcare, Inc. was removed from several major Russell growth indexes, including the Russell Top 200 Growth and Russell 1000 Growth benchmarks, following the latest index rebalancing. This wave of index deletions matters because it can force mechanical selling by index-tracking funds, potentially amplifying short-term trading volume around HCA Healthcare’s shares. We’ll now examine how HCA Healthcare’s removal from key Russell growth indexes may influence the...
